title: Test-Driven Development
description: Drive an implementation from tests, red-green-refactor.
content:
Let's build {{feature}} using strict TDD.

Step 1: Write the smallest failing test for the next slice of behavior — stop and show me only the test.
Step 2: After I confirm, write the minimum code to make it pass.
Step 3: Refactor if needed, keeping tests green.

Proceed one cycle at a time. Don't write implementation ahead of a test that demands it.
